top_stories.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
top_stories.insight: The passing of Alan Greenspan marks the end of an era in US monetary policy, with potential implications for future Fed decisions.

top_stories.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
top_stories.insight: A more hawkish Fed under Warsh could lead to increased interest rates, affecting the overall economy and markets.

top_stories.title: ECB’s Lane Sees Danger Inflation Will Top 2% for Some Time
top_stories.insight: Prolonged high inflation could lead to changes in monetary policy, impacting economic growth and interest rates.

top_stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_stories.insight: The AI-driven sell-off in stocks could have long-term implications for the tech industry and the overall market.

top_stories.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
top_stories.insight: Changes to the Fed rate statement could signal a shift in monetary policy, affecting interest rates and the economy.

daily_summary: The financial markets are experiencing significant changes with the passing of Alan Greenspan, a potential shift in Fed policy under Warsh, and ongoing inflation concerns. The AI-driven sell-off in stocks has added to market volatility, making it essential for investors to stay informed and adapt to the changing landscape.
